audit.no_rows: Try changing your filters or search terms.

hostlms.alert_text: Failed to fetch HostLMS, will retry. If this error persists, please refresh the page.
hostlms.name: Host LMS name
hostlms.no_results: No Host LMSs were found. Try changing your search terms or filters.
hostlms.no_rows: No Host LMSs are available. If you're expecting data to be here, please refresh the page.

requesting.shared_index_unavailable_title: Shared index is not configured on this system
requesting.shared_index_unavailable_message: Please set a valid DCB_SEARCH_BASE environment variable for this deployment.
requesting.items_error_title: We could not load the associated items
requesting.no_data: No data available. Please enter a search term, or change your current search.

expedited_checkout.description: Welcome to DCB on-site borrowing. Please provide the barcode and the library of the patron you would like to make a request for. <paragraph>Provided that the patron's details are valid and the item exists and is available at your library, DCB will instantly check out this item to the specified patron.</paragraph>

feedback.in_progress: Your on-site borrowing request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.in_progress_explanation: Your on-site borrowing request has been successfully placed and DCB is now attempting to check it out.
feedback.success: Your on-site borrowing request has been checked out successfully and can be tracked in DCB Admin <linkComponent> here </linkComponent>.

steps.checkout_failure: Item checkout is taking too long. Please view the request and use the 'check for updates' option to refresh its status.
steps.checkout_success: The item has been successfully checked out, and all steps are complete. The due date for this item is {{dueDate}}
steps.checkout_waiting: The request has been created. Please wait while we attempt to check out the item.
steps.patron_validation_instruction: Please provide the barcode and the affiliated institution of the patron.
steps.request_creation_instruction: The patron barcode is valid. Please now provide the remaining details.

shared_index.items_not_shown_helper_item: Items without an item type are usually the result of a missing or misconfigured item type mapping. Please review the item type mappings for this library.
shared_index.items_not_shown_helper_location: Items without an 'Agency' value are usually the result of a missing or misconfigured Location mapping, or a missing agency. Please review the Location mappings for this library and the agency configuration.
shared_index.items_not_shown_long: {{number}} item(s) not shown for cluster {{id}}. You may have missing mappings or other configuration issues.
shared_index.items_not_shown_resolution: If the item(s) below belong to your library and should be available to users, please review the mappings in the 'Mappings' section. There may be incorrect or missing mappings preventing DCB from showing the items below
shared_index.items_unavailable: No items are available for this cluster
shared_index.title: Shared index

patron.description: Please provide the barcode and the library of the patron you would like to make a staff request for.

error.no_brackets: Please remove any brackets from the barcode.

request.duplicate: A request already exists for this patron at this library within the time window of 900 seconds.

error.validation_failure: We were unable to validate this patron. Please correct the barcode and/or affiliated institution, and try again.
error.validate_first: You must validate a patron before attempting to make a staff request on their behalf.

selection.automatic_context: DCB will automatically select an item to fulfil this request.
selection.manual_context: DCB will use the criteria provided to select an item to fulfil this request

success.lookup: The patron {{barcode}} has been successfully validated for {{library}}.
success.request: Your staff request has been successfully placed and can be tracked in DCB Admin <linkComponent> here </linkComponent>.

staff_request.select_pickup: We have succesfully validated the patron provided. Please choose a pickup location and click 'Submit' to finish placing this staff request.

tooltips.logo: Click this logo to go to the home page

locations.lat: Enter the latitude: a number between -90 and 90.
locations.long: Enter the longitude: a number between -180 and 180
locations.local_id_folio: FOLIO service point ID must be a valid UUID.
locations.local_id_polaris: Polaris org ID must be a non-negative integer
locations.local_id_sierra: Sierra location ID must be a non-negative integer

validation.max_length: This field has a maximum length of {{length}} characters

welcome.background: DCB Admin for Libraries is an all-new part of the DCB experience, putting the power of Direct Consortial Borrowing in the hands of library staff worldwide. Tailored to the tasks library staff do every day, DCB Admin abstracts away the noise and delivers exactly the information you want, when you want it.
welcome.title: Welcome to DCB Admin for {{library}}, {{name}}.
